phases.name: philosophy list surfaces each seed's seeAlso links (reference discoverability)

steps.name: render the seeAlso line in each philosophy list block
steps.description: slice-31 made `philosophy list` surface each seed's `aliases:` line, but the `seeAlso` reference links (only rendered today by `philosophy show` via render_record) are still invisible on the discovery surface — a user browsing the vocabulary cannot see where to read more without opening each record. Append a `seeAlso: <joined>` line to each list block in render_seed_block (crates/cli/src/render/philosophy.rs), rendered only when the seed carries any seeAlso. Bare comma-separated URL strings (mirroring the slice-31 aliases line and render_record's convention) — NOT object-ids — so the slice-22 distinct-object-id count (PV-2) and object-id-form checks (PV-3) are untouched (seeAlso URLs contain no `org.openlore.philosophy.` prefix).
criteria: OWNED every_seed_renders_its_see_also_in_the_list (each seed's exact `seeAlso: <joined>` line renders in its list block; a no-seeAlso seed renders no empty label)
ACCEPTANCE philosophy_list_surfaces_seed_see_also (CLI `philosophy list` stdout carries a `seeAlso:` label and the memory-safety wikipedia reference URL)

GUARDRAIL slice-22 philosophy_vocabulary acceptance (PV-1..PV-6: object ids, >=10 distinct count, id form, --json, text-default, network-disabled) + slice-31 philosophy_list_surfaces_seed_aliases stay green
steps.implementation_notes:
render_seed_block appends `
  seeAlso: {joined}` only when `!seed.see_also.is_empty()`, AFTER the slice-31 aliases line; blocks stay 

-separated. seeAlso values render as bare URL strings, never NSID-prefixed object-ids, so distinct_object_ids (PV-2) does not count them and PV-3's object-id-form guard is unaffected. --json (PV-4) already serializes seeAlso via the full record — unchanged. Pure renderer change; no crate/dep/route change, check-arch stays 21. Demo: openlore philosophy list. Mirrors slice-31 (aliases on the CLI list); viewer /philosophies seeAlso parity is a candidate slice-34.

validation.review_verdict: SHIPPED — single-step pure-renderer polish mirroring slice-31 for seeAlso. RED demonstrated before GREEN (list carried aliases but no seeAlso line); 1 owned pin (+ no-seeAlso no-empty-label pin) + 1 acceptance scenario green. slice-22 list contract (object-id count/form, --json, text-default, network-disabled) + slice-31 aliases line preserved by rendering bare seeAlso URL strings only. No crate/dep/route change; check-arch stays 21.
